faq.question: What is SEO and why is it important for my business?
faq.answer: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is the process of optimizing your website to rank higher in search engine results like Google. It's crucial because 75% of users never scroll past the first page of search results. Higher rankings mean more organic traffic, leads, and revenue for your business without paying for ads.

faq.question: How long does it take to see SEO results?
faq.answer: Most businesses see initial SEO improvements within 3-6 months, with significant results appearing after 6-12 months. SEO is a long-term investment that builds sustainable organic traffic, unlike paid advertising which stops when you stop paying.

faq.question: How much do SEO services cost?
faq.answer: Professional SEO services typically range from $500 to $5,000+ per month depending on your industry, competition, and goals. Our agency offers flexible SEO packages tailored to businesses of all sizes, with transparent pricing and no hidden fees.

faq.question: What's the difference between on-page and off-page SEO?
faq.answer: On-page SEO involves optimizing elements on your website (content, meta tags, site structure), while off-page SEO focuses on external factors like backlinks, social signals, and brand mentions. Both are essential for ranking higher on Google.

faq.question: Do I need technical SEO if my website is new?
faq.answer: Yes! Technical SEO is crucial for new websites to ensure proper indexing, fast loading speeds, mobile optimization, and Core Web Vitals compliance. Starting with solid technical SEO prevents costly fixes later and helps you rank faster.
